title: 10 best herbal tinctures for runny nose
description: Lemon verbena tinctures helps with runny nose because of its natural antihistamine properties, which help to reduce inflammation and congestion in the nasal passages. The herb's essential oils, such as citral and limonene, have a decongestant effect that can alleviate excess mucus production and sinus pressure, making it an effective remedy for relieving a runny nose.
